title: The Invisible in Quantum Measurement

analysis.object: T441: The Invisible in Quantum Measurement depth analysis

wavefunction.description: Quantum wavefunction: EML-3 oscillatory probability amplitude

measurement.reason: collapse = depth reduction from EML-3 to EML-2

decoherence.description: Environmental decoherence: EML-3 → EML-2 continuous collapse
decoherence.reason: decoherence = EML-3 leaking into EML-2 environment

quantum_invisible_law.description: T441: quantum measurement = EML-3 to EML-2 depth reduction; the invisible wavefunction is EML-3

analysis.theorem: T441: The Invisible in Quantum Measurement (S720).
